case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. GUSTAVO A. CASTRO REYES

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED MAY-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, GUSTAVO A. CASTRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GUSTAVO A. CASTRO REYES. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE.
